---
title: "Jin Niu  牛津"
about:
  template: marquee
  image: newport.jpg
  # image-width: 40em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    # - icon: github
    #  text: Github
    #  href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jin-niu-4111a5205/
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=C0kCsrgAAAAJ
---

I am interested in applied econometrics, urban, and public economics.

## Education

##### Brown University | Providence, RI
PhD in Economics | August 2023 - present


##### University of Michigan | Ann Arbor, MI
B.S in Economics & Statistics, Mathematics | September 2019 - May 2023


## Experience

Have been a teaching assistant at Brown for

- Mathematical Econometrics (EC1630) - Toru Kitagawa
- International Trade (EC1540) - Kellie Forrester
- Environmental Economics (EC1050) - Alex Poterack
- Urban Economics (EC1040) - Matthew Turner

Was a undergraduate research assistant at the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, for

- Florian Gunsilius
- Ya'acov Ritov
